checks.name: BOARDROOM_NO_REGRESSION
checks.detail: Signal field, posture cards, cockpit instruments render. No query chips, no answer panels.

checks.name: DENSE_QUERY_CHIP_RENDERING
checks.detail: Zone paths render as clickable query chips with zone badge and GUIDED QUERIES label.

checks.name: QUERY_SELECTION
checks.detail: Click path item sets activeQueryKey, left column transforms to answer panel.

checks.name: ANSWER_PANEL_CONTENT
checks.detail: Answer panel shows question, summary, evidence rows, structural context, governance boundary.

checks.name: ANSWER_EVIDENCE_ACCURACY
checks.detail: semanticTopology:0 — Structurally backed: 4, Semantic only: 13, Grounding ratio: 24%. Matches fullReport topology_summary.

checks.name: QUERY_DISMISSAL
checks.detail: Dismiss button clears activeQueryKey, removes answer panel, restores zone interpretation.

checks.name: ZONE_CHANGE_CLEARS_QUERY
checks.detail: Scroll from semanticTopology to signalAssessment clears query, shows new zone interpretation.

checks.name: EXPLORED_QUERY_INDICATOR
checks.detail: Previously clicked query shows data-explored=true. Unexplored query has no attribute.

checks.name: MULTIPLE_QUERY_SELECTION
checks.detail: signalAssessment:0 shows signal data; signalAssessment:1 shows concentration data. Cross-zone and within-zone switching works.

checks.name: INVESTIGATION_NO_REGRESSION
checks.detail: No query chips, no answer panels in INVESTIGATION mode.

checks.name: GOVERNANCE_ENVELOPE
checks.detail: Expanded footer shows 'Guided queries: STRUCTURALLY DERIVED' row.

checks.name: KEYBOARD_ACCESSIBILITY
checks.detail: Tab to focus query chip, Enter to select, Escape to dismiss. Full keyboard flow.

checks.name: NARRATIVE_OVERLAY_COEXISTENCE
checks.detail: Hover on non-selected path shows narrative overlay (display:block when parent hovered).

checks.name: TERM_COLLISION_CHECK
checks.detail: Guided Query, Answer Panel, Query Chip, Explored/Unexplored — none collide with TERMINOLOGY_LOCK.md.

checks.name: AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY
checks.detail: All 12 derive functions read only from fullReport. No inference, no AI-generated content.

checks.name: MODE_ISOLATION
checks.detail: Query interaction only in EXECUTIVE_DENSE. BOARDROOM, BALANCED, INVESTIGATION: no query infrastructure.
